title: Godavari River Flooding — Rajahmundry
description: Heavy rainfall upstream has caused Godavari river levels to exceed danger mark by 2.3m. Approximately 4 riverside villages inundated. Roads cut off. Residents stranded on rooftops.

title: Industrial Fire — Pune MIDC
description: Chemical warehouse fire in industrial zone. Toxic fumes reported. 3 workers missing. Fire spreading to adjacent units. Wind direction pushing smoke toward residential area 800m east.

title: Landslide — NH44 Ramban
description: Major landslide has blocked NH44 at km 214. Approximately 40 vehicles stranded. 2 confirmed injuries. Rain continues. Further slides possible on unstable slope above.

title: Cyclone Landfall Watch — Paradip Coast
description: Category 3 cyclone forecast to make landfall within 18 hours. Wind speeds 120-140 kmph expected. Storm surge of 2-4m projected. Pre-emptive evacuation of 50,000 coastal residents underway.
